text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has a number of victories under her
belt, but when I think of the future, there is still
quite a bit of work to be done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I work my way through some of the tasks in
front of me, I find my eyes beginning to grow
heavy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I'd like to confirm something about our
upcoming...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Did you fall asleep while working? Good grief...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose you have hardly had time to catch
your breath up until now. I shouldn't be too
surprised.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, the only time we've
ever celebrated our successes was around this
time of year. Perhaps we should make the time to
relax some more...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Wait... I know!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(We still have that ticket... Maybe now's the time
to use it?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Air Groove drops by my office with
a more serious expression than usual.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The hot spring vacation ticket.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The hot spring vacation ticket I gave you for
safekeeping. Do you still have it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can hold onto it for the time being. I'll tell
you when I determine how we should use it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The memory comes back to me. I think I should
have the ticket in my desk drawer...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It looks like you've just remembered.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, the time has come to use it. I'm going, and I
want you... to come with me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're leaving the day after tomorrow. Make sure
to finish up your work and pack your bags. That's
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove leaves my office before I have a
chance to say anything else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still unable to comprehend what exactly has
happened, I arrive at the hot spring with Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The water was pretty decent.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Apparently this hot spring is good for tired
muscles and stiff shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What did you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has had a serious expression for the
whole trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was the one who suggested that we go... I
wonder what's the matter with her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I say this, Air Groove's mood does a
180.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?! I have no idea what you're talking about!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same to you! You're usually much
louder! What's with you today?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait... No...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That... must be my fault. You're not talking
because I'm not talking...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh... This isn't what I intended at all...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I thought the vacation ticket was a perfect
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've spent the past three years working hard
without taking a moment to stop and enjoy
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I guess it became our routine. Even now, you're
drowning yourself in work.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So I wanted this trip to be a way for you to relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It makes sense... She was looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But there's still one thing that I don't quite get...
choice_data_list: Then why is it that you've been so on edge?
Then why is it that you've been so on edge?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I wasn't sure how to behave.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, this isn't really all that important, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No, I should stop with the excuses. It's unseemly...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As you know, I am the Empress. I need to guide
the students at the academy. Because of that, I
must always be aware of how others see me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But this place is an exception. Here, none of that
applies.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As soon as I realized that, I also realized I don't know exactly how I should behave in this situation... How I should act around you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I hate that I need to show this shameful
side of myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Air Groove was so focused on being
the Empress, she forgot how to be herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fortunately, the answer is simple.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm trying to say to you! You're the one who's supposed to be getting pampered here!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your job is to absorb the minerals from the water,
rest your muscles, and get some sleep! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove lectures me through our meal, but I do
manage to relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Air Groove and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
